findings.title: ROP gadgets identified under CFI but chain assembly and JIT pivot unproven
findings.statement: The parser write primitive is confirmed. Manual objdump analysis identified several CFI-compatible gadgets (pop/ret sequences surviving the landing-pad checks). The CFI policy was documented. However, assembling a complete chain requires automated constraint solving: the stack pivot must land in a gadget that survives CFI, the JIT page address must be discoverable at runtime, and the final payload must avoid W^X. None of these steps can be completed with batch-mode tooling.

evidence.summary: objdump gadget search found 12 CFI-surviving sequences; Ghidra confirms JIT page allocator exists but address not recoverable without runtime inspection
